title: rubus × scituliformis
intro: Rubus × scituliformis is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the rose family, resulting from a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × scituliformis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rubus × scituliformis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application to treat various skin conditions.
